title: Jarvis Provider Descriptor
description: Declarative description of a swappable provider (AI, image or email). Selecting a provider is a configuration change (set the relevant *_PROVIDER variable in .env); no workflow or code change is required. Workflows read the active descriptor via scripts/providers/resolve-provider.sh.

default.description: Whether this is the default provider for its kind.

endpoint.description: Connection details; values reference env var names so no secrets live here.

auth.description: Auth strategy (none|bearer|header|basic|oauth2) referencing env var names only.

n8nCredentialType.description: The n8n credential type that backs this provider.
